name: King of Saudi Arabia
mandate: Enacts primary legislation by royal decree on approval of the Council of Ministers and the Shura Council.

name: Saudi Data and AI Authority
mandate: National competent authority for data governance, personal data protection, and artificial intelligence in Saudi Arabia.

name: President of the United Arab Emirates
mandate: Enacts federal decree laws and federal laws on the federal legislative process of the UAE.

name: UAE Data Office
mandate: Federal data protection regulator established to supervise the UAE Personal Data Protection Law and propose data policies.

name: UAE Artificial Intelligence, Digital Economy and Remote Work Applications Office
name_ar: مكتب الذكاء الاصطناعي والاقتصاد الرقمي وتطبيقات العمل عن بعد
mandate: Government office leading UAE policy on artificial intelligence and the digital economy.

name: DIFC Commissioner of Data Protection
name_ar: مفوض حماية البيانات في مركز دبي المالي العالمي
mandate: Supervises and enforces the Data Protection Law of the Dubai International Financial Centre.

name: ADGM Office of Data Protection
name_ar: مكتب حماية البيانات في سوق أبوظبي العالمي
mandate: Administers and enforces the Data Protection Regulations of Abu Dhabi Global Market.

name: King of Bahrain
mandate: Ratifies and promulgates laws passed by the National Assembly of Bahrain.

name: Bahrain Personal Data Protection Authority
mandate: Supervises and enforces the Bahrain Personal Data Protection Law.

name: Central Bank of Bahrain
mandate: Regulates and supervises the banking, insurance, and capital markets sectors in Bahrain through the CBB Rulebook.

name: Emir of Qatar
mandate: Enacts laws and emiri decrees under the Constitution of Qatar.

name: Qatar National Cyber Security Agency
mandate: National authority for cybersecurity in Qatar, hosting the compliance and data protection function for the personal data privacy law.

name: QFC Data Protection Office
name_ar: مكتب حماية البيانات في مركز قطر للمال
mandate: Supervises and enforces the Data Protection Regulations of the Qatar Financial Centre.

name: Kuwait Communication and Information Technology Regulatory Authority
mandate: Regulates telecommunications and information technology in Kuwait, including data privacy protection rules for service providers.

name: Sultan of Oman
mandate: Enacts laws by royal decree as the supreme legislative authority of Oman.

name: Oman Ministry of Transport, Communications and Information Technology
mandate: Ministry responsible for transport, communications, and information technology policy in Oman, including implementation of the personal data protection law.
